user.title: Connect to PlayStation Network
user.description:
Enter your NPSSO token to authenticate with PSN.

{npsso_hint}

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate with PlayStation Network
reauth_confirm.description:
Your PSN session has expired. Enter a fresh NPSSO token.

{npsso_hint}

reconfigure.title: Update PSN Credentials
reconfigure.description:
Enter a fresh NPSSO token to update your credentials.

{npsso_hint}

error.invalid_npsso: Invalid or expired NPSSO token. Please get a fresh one from the URL above.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to PlayStation Network servers.

abort.already_configured: This PSN account is already configured.
